changeLog.what: Added soft link property and usage guidelines. Added external link icon usage guidelines. Added leading icon to anatomy
Add description, anatomy description, usage guidelines and properties.

properties.name: Soft
properties.description: Wether the icon is soft or not. The soft version makes the link be styled in the same way as default text. Only on hover does it have the default link styling.

properties.name: Show external link icon
properties.description: Wether to show the external link icon (if it is an external link).

properties.name: Action
properties.description: The action that should be performed if this command link is used.

properties.name: Target
properties.description: Where the user should be linked to (if it is a navigational link).

properties.name: Link text
properties.description: The text that should be shown for this link.

table.name: Leading icon
table.description: Optional icon that can be used to represent the nature of the link

table.name: External link icon
table.description: If the link is external relative to the the current website or application the designer can choose to display an external link icon next to the link text.

table.name: Link text
table.description: The text that is also the clickable are of the icon. On click it will forward the user to the target of the link (or perform the associated action).
